title: Section 171
content: The order of the court confirming, setting aside or modifying an order in respect of any rateable value or assessment or liability to assessment or taxation shall be final: Provided that it shall be lawful for the 1[Municipal Taxation Tribunal], upon application or on its own motion, to review any order passed by it in appeal within three months from the date of the order.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, s. 33, for “court” (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).
